identity: AI Systems Laboratory - confident, minimal, technical, deliberate

rules.headlines: font-serif font-light or regular, extremely tight tracking
rules.system_text: font-mono text-status-live_green or text-accent-blue uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

hero.rules: No 3D globe. Use framer-motion for line-by-line masked text reveal. Overflow hidden on lines, y: 100% -> 0. Minimal copy. Include a subtle parallax background element (like dark ASCII art or technical grid pattern). Align text left.
hero.ctas: Two buttons: 'See Work' (Primary pill, #5B73FF background) and 'Resume' (Secondary outline, pure white border).

system_status_panel.style: Neo-brutalist technical card. Monospace text (JetBrains Mono).
system_status_panel.content: Key:Value pairs (Role, Location, Visa, Shipped-Count). Status: 'Actively Interviewing' with a pulsing green dot (#4ADE80 bg, animate-pulse).
system_status_panel.border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1), flat background, no shadows.

tech_icon_field.interaction: Floating icons that gently repel from the cursor using framer-motion springs or simple math in requestAnimationFrame.
tech_icon_field.icons: 10 real logos: Python, PostgreSQL, PyTorch, AWS, FastAPI, Docker, MLflow, Neo4j, GitHub, XGBoost. Use react-icons or lucide-react approximations if specific logos are unavailable, but prioritize actual brand svgs.

terminal_easter_egg.trigger: Floating minimal button (bottom right) or backtick (`).
terminal_easter_egg.style: Retro-futuristic terminal overlay. #0d0f1e background, 1px #5B73FF border, #4ADE80 text.
terminal_easter_egg.commands: help, about, experience, projects, skills, credentials, resume, contact, whoami, clear, theme, coffee, sudo hire yachi, achievements.

command_palette.style: Dark glassmorphism overlay. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0d0f1e]/80 border border-white/10.

projects_section.tabs: All / Live Products / GenAI & Agents / Research.
projects_section.cards: Cinematic. 3D tilt-on-hover using framer-motion. Use real screenshots.
projects_section.architecture_explorer: For RentPilot. Replace standard image with an interactive pipeline (Client -> API -> AI Layer -> Data Layer -> Auth). Click nodes to reveal tech/decisions.

labelmaster_case_study.style: Data-heavy dashboard card. Dark grey/blue background.
labelmaster_case_study.chart: Use Recharts. Bar chart comparing LSTM vs XGBoost WAPE across 8 departments. Minimal axes, highlight XGBoost in #4ADE80, LSTM in #a3a3a3.

interactive_timeline.style: Horizontal scrolling or sticky vertical scroll timeline (2022-2026). Monospace years, Serif headlines for roles.
interactive_timeline.interaction: Reveal text on scroll using framer-motion useScroll.

tiers.core: Large distinct cards with subtle blue borders.
tiers.supporting: Compact tags, monospace text, extremely minimal.

marquee.style: One slow editorial marquee using react-fast-marquee. Font-serif, very slow speed, muted text (#a3a3a3 or #ffffff/20).

contact_form.style: Technical, flat inputs. Bottom border only (border-b) or highly structured bento layout. No standard generic boxes.
contact_form.links: Email, LinkedIn, GitHub listed in monospace.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: MUST use Lenis (@studio-freight/lenis) for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion_and_interaction.toasts: Achievement/Exploration toasts using Sonner. Triggered when discovering the terminal or clicking specific nodes. Dark mode styled.

WanderMind_AI.description: Dark abstract fluid pattern for WanderMind AI placeholder

PulseBoard_AI.description: Dark abstract data visualization for PulseBoard AI placeholder

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No random hex codes.
Do NOT use gradients anywhere. Backgrounds should be flat #0d0f1e or #14172a.
Typography strictly requires: Cormorant Garamond (headings), Inter (body), JetBrains Mono (tech details). Fetch via Google Fonts in index.css.
No 3D globe in the hero section.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive elements.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or modals; use solid #14172a or heavy backdrop-blur.
Install mentioned libraries if they are missing.
Use Framer Motion for all entrance animations and the kinetic hero text reveal.
Implement the Command Palette (Cmd+K) using cmdk.
Ensure the contact form integrates seamlessly.
All components must be functional React (.js or .jsx) files, using Tailwind for styling.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic.
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients. Use them as flat solid backgrounds.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and 1px borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
NEVER use placeholder text for images. Use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Ensure the final website feels like an 'award-winning' portfolio.
